<li>👤 <strong>User Management</strong> - Manage all users and providers</li>
<li>⚙️ <strong>Platform Settings</strong> - Configure fees and requirements</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🛠️ Tech Stack</h2><a id="user-content-️-tech-stack" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🛠️ Tech Stack" href="#️-tech-stack"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Create FREE Resend Account:</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Go to <a href="https://resend.com" rel="nofollow">resend.com</a></li>
<li>Sign up with your email</li>
<li>Go to <a href="https://resend.com/api-keys" rel="nofollow">API Keys</a></li>
<li>Click "Create API Key"</li>
<li>Copy your key (starts with <code>re_</code>)</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Update <code>.env</code> file:</strong></p>

RESEND_FROM_EMAIL=onboarding@resend.dev</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
